<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link the design section if relevant (e.g. design §7.5). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (portable packages)
- [ ] `go vet` clean on the portable packages
- [ ] On a Linux host: eBPF packages build (`make build`); for detector changes, `make stress` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (incl. ✅ built / 🔜 planned tags) and `CHANGELOG.md` / `docs/PROGRESS.md` if user-visible
- [ ] Follows the design §7.2.1 package layout
